# AI Disclaimer:
#
# This file is generated by codex (AI coding agnet) against the codebase with
# human review and feedback

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.26)

project(gpjson-cpp
  VERSION 0.1.0
  DESCRIPTION "C++/CUDA implementation of GpJSON"
  LANGUAGES CXX CUDA)

include(CTest)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)

set(CMAKE_CUDA_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CUDA_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

if(NOT DEFINED CMAKE_CUDA_ARCHITECTURES)
  # Build real device code for every major architecture nvcc supports so local
  # runs do not depend on PTX JIT compatibility with the installed driver.
  set(CMAKE_CUDA_ARCHITECTURES all-major)
endif()

option(GPJSON_CPP_DEBUG "Enable GPJSON debug logging and assertions" OFF)

file(GLOB_RECURSE GPJSON_SOURCES CONFIGURE_DEPENDS
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/gpjson/*.cpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/gpjson/*.cu"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/gpjson/*.cu_inl"
)

add_library(gpjson-cpp_lib ${GPJSON_SOURCES})

set_source_files_properties(
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/gpjson/query/kernels/orig/query_executor_host.cpp
  PROPERTIES LANGUAGE CUDA
)

target_include_directories(gpjson-cpp_lib
  PUBLIC
    $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
    $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>
  PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src
)

set_target_properties(gpjson-cpp_lib PROPERTIES
  CXX_STANDARD 17
  CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON
  CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF
)
if(GPJSON_CPP_DEBUG)
  target_compile_definitions(gpjson-cpp_lib PUBLIC GPJSON_CPP_DEBUG)
endif()

target_compile_options(gpjson-cpp_lib
  PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:--expt-relaxed-constexpr>
)

set_target_properties(gpjson-cpp_lib PROPERTIES
  CUDA_SEPARABLE_COMPILATION ON
  CUDA_RESOLVE_DEVICE_SYMBOLS ON
)

find_package(CUDAToolkit REQUIRED)
target_link_libraries(gpjson-cpp_lib PUBLIC CUDA::cudart)

add_subdirectory(apps)


if(BUILD_TESTING)
  add_subdirectory(tests)
endif()
